div.p: Process Workflow: open → load → verify BTF → attach → bpf_link Security Context: Requires CAP_BPF and CAP_TRACING Kernel Visibility: /sys/kernel/debug/tracing/events/

ul.li: Relocation: Patches map FDs into instructions.
BTF Sanitization: Downgrades BTF for older kernels if needed.
EINVAL: SEC() name mismatch or invalid type
ENOENT: Tracepoint not found in registry

g.title: Parses ELF sections, relocations, and maps
Parses ELF sections, relocations, and maps
